name: Dark Magician the Dragon Knight
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ブラック・マジシャン
desc:
"Dark Magician" + 1 Dragon monster
This card's name becomes "Dark Magician" while on the field or in the GY. Your opponent cannot target Spells/Traps you control with card effects, also they cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

stat_change: Changes own name while on the field

mst: Prevents other cards being targeted by card effects
Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
